plugin.name: wayfire-panel-push
plugin._long: Slide the whole scene (wallpaper + windows) away from one screen edge by a fixed amount to free a strip for a push-reveal panel. Driven over IPC by lumen-panel's "push" mode; the panel slides in as the scene slides away.

option.name: toggle
option._long: Optional keybinding that toggles the push directly, for debugging. lumen-panel normally drives this over IPC.

option.name: dismiss
option._long: Optional secondary binding that only restores the pushed scene. Unset by default so it does not conflict with other consumers of Escape.

option.name: push_px
option._long: How far the scene slides away from the edge — should match the panel height.

option.name: direction
option._long: Which edge the panel sits on: "top" slides the scene down, "bottom" slides it up.

option.name: exclude_app_id
option._long: app-id / layer-shell namespace of the view that must NOT be pushed (the panel itself).
